decks.notes: This deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures, then use reanimation spells like Unearth and Persist to bring them back to the battlefield. By combining discard outlets like Faithless Looting and Thoughtseize with graveyard manipulation cards like Thought Scour, the deck can consistently set up explosive plays. The key strategy is to use these combo pieces to cheat out big threats like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones early in the game, overwhelming the opponent before they can react. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Fatal Push and Spell Pierce to protect its combo.

The key concept of this deck is to utilize the combination of Basking Broodscale, Glaring Fleshraker, and Blade of the Bloodchief to generate powerful creature synergies and overwhelm the opponent quickly. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Unholy Heat and Malevolent Rumble to control the board and protect the combo pieces. With the help of Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga, this deck aims to ramp up and assemble its combo pieces efficiently to dominate the battlefield and secure victory. The inclusion of Emrakul, the Promised End provides a powerful finisher option to close out games.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy, utilizing powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly deal damage. The deck also includes disruption cards like Blood Moon and Static Prison to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Boromir, Warden of the Tower provides a strong finisher for the deck. Overall, the key concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to apply constant pressure on the opponent and close out the game quickly.

This deck focuses on quickly putting powerful creatures into play from the graveyard through various reanimation spells and abilities. It includes cards that allow for quick graveyard filling, efficient removal, and countermagic to protect the combo. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with large threats that can end the game in just a few turns, utilizing the graveyard as a resource to fuel the combo. The strategy revolves around assembling the combo pieces and utilizing reanimation effects to take control of the game and secure a win.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of control elements and powerful creatures to dominate the game. It includes cards that disrupt the opponent's strategy, such as Teferi, Time Raveler and Orim's Chant, while also having efficient removal options like Prismatic Ending and Wrath of the Skies. The deck also includes versatile threats like Omnath, Locus of Creation and Solitude to apply pressure and end the game quickly. By controlling the game tempo and adapting to different situations, this deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and secure victory.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on a fast and aggressive strategy, using powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It also includes support cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Thraben Charm to control the board and protect your creatures. Mana Tithe and Goblin Bombardment provide additional removal and disruption, while Seasoned Pyromancer offers card advantage. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and spells, while disrupting their game plan with targeted removal and protection.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly reanimate powerful creatures, such as Griselbrand or Ulamog, the Defiler, using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Faithful Mending. The combo potential is enhanced with cards like Ephemerate and Quantum Riddler to protect your key pieces and disrupt your opponent's strategy with counterspells like Force of Negation. Additionally, the deck includes instant removal options like Prismatic Ending and Solitude to stay ahead in the game. Ultimately, the goal is to overwhelm your opponent with a fast and efficient reanimation strategy.

This deck focuses on utilizing creature toolbox cards to create powerful combos and synergies. By using cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Agatha's Soul Cauldron to search for specific creatures, and cards like Yawgmoth, Thran Physician and Malevolent Rumble to control the board and generate value, the deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and overwhelm them with a diverse array of threats. With a mix of aggressive creatures like Delighted Halfling and control elements like Badgermole Cub, the deck is able to adapt to different matchups and strategies.

The deck focuses on a fast and aggressive playstyle, utilizing low mana-cost creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It includes strong removal options in the form of Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge, along with powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls. The deck also benefits from a mix of utility cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Thraben Charm to give it versatility in different situations. The Boros color combination provides a balance of aggression and control, making it a formidable opponent in one-on-one matches.

This deck focuses on using Basking Broodscale's ability to generate mana and power up Glaring Fleshraker to control the board. It utilizes cards like Ancient Stirrings and Urza's Saga to help find key pieces quickly, while also having disruption in the form of Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble. The deck aims to ramp up quickly using Eldrazi Temple and other lands, eventually casting Emrakul, the Promised End and overwhelming the opponent with powerful creatures. Additionally, cards like Blade of the Bloodchief and Cavern of Souls help further enhance the deck's strategy.

This deck focuses on aggressive creature strategies combined with the ability to repeatedly "blink" or exile and return creatures to the battlefield for value. It aims to disrupt opponents with hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize, removal spells like Fatal Push, and disruptive planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler while powering up its own creatures with cards like Ephemerate and Overlord of the Balemurk. By maximizing the utility of creature abilities and creating a fast, disruptive board presence, this deck seeks to overwhelm opponents and quickly close out games.

The deck focuses on aggressive plays and utilizing flicker effects to repeatedly trigger powerful enters-the-battlefield abilities. It combines powerful threats like Overlord of the Balemurk and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd with removal spells like Fatal Push and Solitude to control the board while applying pressure. The deck also utilizes disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Teferi, Time Raveler to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By blinking creatures with cards like Flickerwisp and Ephemerate, the deck can create value and tempo advantages to overwhelm the opponent.

The deck focuses on using artifacts to quickly overwhelm the opponent with creatures and card advantage. It utilizes cards like Arcbound Ravager, Mishra's Bauble, and Mox Opal to generate quick mana and additional resources. With the help of Urza's Saga and Weapons Manufacturing, the deck can create a wide board presence and deal damage swiftly. The interaction between artifacts and various support cards like Metallic Rebuke and Engineered Explosives allows for a versatile and aggressive playstyle that can catch opponents off guard.

This Modern Aggro-Affinity deck focuses on quickly building artifact-based aggression with cards like Arcbound Ravager and Engineered Explosives. By utilizing cards such as Mishra's Bauble and Mox Opal for quick ramping, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful artifact creatures and disruptive spells like Metallic Rebuke. The inclusion of Urza's Saga and Weapons Manufacturing further enhances the deck's artifact synergy, allowing for a fast and aggressive playstyle. Skateboard is included as a unique tech choice for additional utility. The deck's strategy revolves around leveraging artifacts for a swift and relentless assault on the opponent.

This aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with low-cost, efficient burn spells and hasty creatures, such as Goblin Guide and Monastery Swiftspear. The key strategy is to quickly deplete the opponent's life total by consistently casting direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt, Lava Spike, and Rift Bolt. Cards like Eidolon of the Great Revel punish opponents for playing spells, while Boros Charm and Skullcrack provide versatility and protection. The mana base is designed for consistency and speed, utilizing fetch lands like Arid Mesa and Bloodstained Mire to ensure the right colors of mana are available.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling a variety of creatures to use them as tools for different situations, using cards like Green Sun's Zenith to search for specific creatures. It also includes cards like Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Yawgmoth, Thran Physician to generate value from sacrificing and recurring creatures. The toolbox aspect of the deck allows for flexibility in adapting to different game states, while the combo potential of certain cards like Malevolent Rumble and Walking Ballista provides avenues for closing out games efficiently.
